name: Unified inquiry/customer model with billing, recipient, service_type

description: Backend complete — migration + repos + routes + offer/invoice billing address resolution + business customer greeting

name: Review fixes — status machine, S3 cleanup, sync tx, capacity count, defaults

description: All review fixes: state machine (5), S3 cleanup (1-4), capacity count (6), COALESCE times (10), defaults (7,13), error logging (3,8), better delete confirm (2)
All review findings fixed: CRIT-1/2/3 recipient creation, CRIT-4 SQL injection, MED-1/2/3/4, MED-7 modal, MED-9 calendar

asi.CRIT-1/2/3: Recipient creation in all 4 submission handlers + admin modal
asi.MED-2: handle_submission passes parking_ban to address creation
asi.MED-5: By design - billing_address_id on customers not used from submissions
asi.MED-7: CreateInquiryModal creates recipient customer via API + inline billing_address
asi.MED-8: PHP path, not a Rust bug

description: All round-3 findings fixed: CRIT-A doc key, CRIT-B/C billing address, MED-A/D/E

asi.CRIT-A: fetch_document_key double _key suffix fixed — column name used directly
asi.MED-C: Removed dead customer_type from inquiry creation body
asi.MED-E: CreateInquiryModal sends parking_ban/elevator in address objects

description: All round-4 findings fixed: CRIT-1 addresses, MED-1/2/3/4/5/6, LOW-A

asi.CRIT-1: startOrt/startPlz/endOrt/endPlz parsed in both parse_inquiry_form and video handler; merge_address_parts() merges explicit city/postal with parsed address string; all 5 handlers (AR, video, photo, manual, admin) now use merged addresses
asi.LOW-A: needs_parking_ban populated from address.parking_ban instead of hardcoded None
asi.MED-1: manuell fast-path: customer-provided volume creates completed 'manual' estimation, sets inquiry to 'estimated', skips vision pipeline entirely; items_text stored in estimation result_data
asi.MED-2: CalendarItemRow includes customer_type + company_name from customers JOIN
asi.MED-3: delete_inquiry validates no active inquiry_days or day_employees before hard delete
asi.MED-5: update_clock_times targets inquiry_day_employees via JOIN instead of flat inquiry_employees
asi.MED-6: Manual volume fast-path spawns ORS distance calculation + try_auto_generate_offer

description: All round-5 findings fixed: BUG-C1/C2/C3, BUG-M1/M2/M3/M5

asi.BUG-C1: manual_inquiry now ORS distance calc + try_auto_generate_offer in correct order
asi.BUG-C2: handle_submission fast-path spawns distance calc BEFORE offer generation
asi.BUG-C3: EstimationMethod::Ar variant added, process_ar_submission_background uses 'ar' not 'depth_sensor'
asi.BUG-M1: manual_inquiry has same volume fast-path as handle_submission — creates 'manual' estimation, sets 'estimated' status
asi.BUG-M2: fetch_assignment reads clock_in/clock_out from inquiry_day_employees instead of NULL
asi.BUG-M3: update_clock_times targets day_number=1 only for multi-day safety

description: Round 6 fixes: C-NEW-1 CHECK constraint, C-NEW-2 clock times, M-NEW-1/2/6

asi.C-NEW-1: Migration adds 'ar' and 'mobile' to submission_mode CHECK constraint
asi.C-NEW-2: fetch_employee_assignments_snapshot reads from inquiry_day_employees (day_number=1) instead of flat inquiry_employees
asi.M-NEW-1: Frontend manuell mode sends volumen + umzugsgut in FormData
asi.M-NEW-2: process_submission_background uses DepthSensor for depth-maps, Vision for photo-only
asi.M-NEW-6: Calendar single-day branch uses inquiry_day_employees instead of flat inquiry_employees

description: 28 new unit tests covering all fixed bug classes

asi.test_categories: merge_address_parts(5), parse_bool_field(2), parse_services(4), EstimationMethod(7), build_notes(3), document_key_sql(2), submission_mode_CHECK(1), status_transitions(1), calendar_day_employees(1), resolve_doc_column(2)
asi.test_framework: Rust #[cfg(test)] unit tests, no DB required
asi.tests_added: 28 new tests across 6 files covering all bug classes from audit rounds

description: 43 new tests: 28 unit tests + 15 DB integration tests

asi.integration_tests: 15 new — covering C-NEW-1 CHECK constraint, MED-2 calendar customer fields, BUG-M2/M3 clock times day_number=1, MED-3 delete check, parking_ban/house_number, business customer, all submission modes, estimation methods, status transitions, billing/recipient IDs, day-employee counts
asi.total: 43 new tests (28 unit + 15 integration), 206 unit + 15 integration = 221 total
asi.unit_tests: 28 new across 6 files — merge_address_parts(5), parse_bool(2), parse_services(4), EstimationMethod(7), build_notes(3), doc_key(2), doc_column_injection(2), status_transitions(1), calendar_query(1), submission_mode_CHECK(1)

description: Audit round 7: M1/M2/M3 + L1/L2/L3 fixes + tests

asi.L1: warn! log when XLSX line items exceed 12 — xlsx.rs
asi.L2: error!-level summary log for S3 orphan keys on inquiry delete
asi.L3: tracing::info! audit trail for delete_user, update_employee, delete_employee, delete_customer, update_customer, delete_inquiry
asi.M1: Race condition: catches unique constraint violation on offer insert, fetches existing offer and updates instead of 500
asi.M2: Hardcoded pricing: moved rate_per_person_hour_cents, assembly_price, parking_ban_price, packing_price, saturday_surcharge_cents to CompanyConfig with serde defaults
asi.M3: Status gate: PATCH /inquiries/{id} blocks volume/services/distance/address changes when status >= offer_ready

description: Add tests that would have caught the actual bugs

asi.M1_test: Integration: duplicate_active_offer_rejected_by_unique_constraint — first active insert succeeds, second fails, rejected is allowed, third active still fails. Also verifies index exists.
asi.M3_test: Unit: 11 is_locked_for_modifications() tests (7 locked statuses, 4 modifiable). Extracted matches! to method on InquiryStatus. Integration: locked_inquiry_rejects_volume_change (verifies offer_ready stored in DB)

asi.lines_saved: ~900 lines (1558 removed, 659 added) = 58% reduction in top-level context
asi.pattern: Upper levels are short pointers, deeper you go the more specific context gets
asi.structure: CLAUDE.md (short pointer) → AGENTS.md (deep context) tree across 12 directories
